headline: Chevron Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: CVX distributes $6 billion to its shareholders, including $2.5 billion in buybacks and $3.5 billion in dividends during the first quarter

headline: NBR Posts Narrower Than Expected Q1 Earnings, Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: NBR expects second-quarter capital expenditures of $180-$190 million, including $75-$80 million for newbuilds in Saudi Arabia.

headline: NOV Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Decrease Y/Y
summary: NOV Q1 earnings miss estimates as Middle East disruptions hit operations, while revenues edge past expectations despite a year-over-year decline.
